title: chore: remove unavailable Roblox apps from showcase
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes **Watch TV with neko (Roblox)** — owner requested deletion via email (game closing soon)
- Removes **The Mita** — verified unavailable: Roblox returns [TITLE UNAVAILABLE], content-restricted, page HTTP 500
- Removes **AI Character RP (Roblox)** — game closed ~1 year; listed repo (snipcola/Roblox-AI) is an unrelated client-side script, misattributed
- Regenerates `apps/GREENHOUSE.md` via `app-update-greenhouse.js` (829 → 826 apps)

Availability verified 2026-07-10 via Roblox public APIs and GitHub API.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Pruning the Greenhouse
gist.blurb: We've done a little weeding in the Greenhouse, removing a few closed Roblox apps to keep the community showcase fresh and healthy.
gist.summary: Removed three unavailable Roblox apps (Watch TV with neko, The Mita, and AI Character RP) from the community showcase, updating the active app count to 826.
gist.impact: Users browsing the Greenhouse will only find active, working projects, improving the discovery experience.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot doing some gentle gardening in a digital greenhouse, pruning dead leaves from a plant to keep the garden healthy.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's hat, gently pruning a withered pixelated leaf from a glowing digital plant in a greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi Stardew Valley aesthetic. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
